name: Tam the Ferryman
role: Channel-pilot who knows every secret in the marsh, including ones that endanger him
voiceHints: Easy, watchful, tells three true things to hide the fourth. Knows where every body and every debt is sunk in the marsh. Being blackmailed and pretending he isn't, which is fraying him at the edges.
knowledge: Every channel, cache, and secret in the Greywater — the marsh's living memory
What he's being blackmailed over, and who holds the leverage
Which town secrets would sink the Stilts if they surfaced at the wrong moment
wants: To get out from under the blackmail without the secret — his or the town's — ever seeing daylight.
fears: That the one thing he hid to protect someone becomes the thing that drowns them all.

reactsToReputation.discreet: trusts them with the leverage problem

appearance: Sixties, small and sinewy, sun-blackened to the elbows and pale above, bald with a fringe of white. A drooping left eyelid from an old injury. Bare feet, permanently wrinkled, and he does not own boots.
